---
title: "Social media and gender, 2017"
author: "Daniel Allington"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)

options(scipen = 999)

d_bes2017 <- read_csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```

Hypothesis

H1 Gender is associated with Facebook use

```{r}
chisq.test(
  d_bes2017$Gender,
  d_bes2017$Use_Facebook
)

```

Findings

Gender is associated with Facebook use, X2(df = 1, n = 2189) = 18.046, p < .001.
